name: DRAKE, GREATER
description: Mountainous, fire-breathing dragon-kin who are as fierce and wild as birds of prey. Tiny, round scales cover their scintillating, purple hide.
statblock: AC 15, HP 38, ATK 2 claw +7 (1d12) or 1 fire gout, MV double near (fly), S +4, D +3, C +2, I -2, W +2, Ch +0, AL N, LV 8

abilities.name: Fireblood
abilities.description: Fire immune.

abilities.name: Fire Gout
abilities.description: Fills a near-sized cube extending from drake. DC 12 DEX or 4d6 damage.

name: DRAKE, LESSER
description: Juvenile drakes whose dull, purple scales have not yet condensed into bright armor. They can't breathe full gouts of fire, but can spit bolts of flame.
statblock: AC 13, HP 28, ATK 2 claw +5 (1d10) or 1 fire spit, MV double near (fly), S +3, D +2, C +1, I -2, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 6

abilities.name: Fireblood
abilities.description: Fire immune.

abilities.name: Fire Spit
abilities.description: One target in double near DC 12 DEX or 3d6 damage.

name: DRAUGR
description: Ragged, undead warriors dripping with blue-black grave rot. A chill follows them, and they can swim through stone.
statblock: AC 16 (chainmail + shield), HP 25, ATK 2 bastard sword +4 (1d8), MV near, S +3, D +1, C +3, I +0, W +0, Ch +3, AL C, LV 5

abilities.name: Greater Undead
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Death Chill
abilities.description: Checks to stabilize dying creatures within near of the draugr are DC 18.

abilities.name: Stone Swim
abilities.description: Draugr can pass through stone as if it were water.

name: DVERG
description: Stocky gnomes who dwell in mountain halls shaped by their peerless craftsmanship. They have rosy cheeks, sparkling eyes, and prodigious beards.
statblock: AC 13 (chainmail), HP 14, ATK 1 greataxe +2 (1d10), MV near, S +2, D +0, C +1, I +1, W +1, Ch +0, AL L, LV 3

abilities.name: Shapeshift
abilities.description: In place of attacks, turn into a small animal, or back into original form.

name: NORD
description: A powerful warrior used to the hardships of the stark north.
statblock: AC 15 (chainmail + shield), HP 10, ATK 1 greataxe +2 (1d8) or 1 shield wall, MV near, S +2, D +0, C +1, I +0, W +0, Ch +0, AL N, LV 2

abilities.name: Shield Wall
abilities.description: AC becomes 20 for 1 round.

name: TROLL, DEEP
description: Wretched, subterranean trolls with inky hide and fiery eyes.
statblock: AC 13, HP 39, ATK 2 claw +7 (1d10), MV near, S +4, D +2, C +3, I -1, W +1, Ch +1, AL C, LV 8

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.description: Regains 2d6 HP on its turn unless injured by a cold iron weapon the prior round.

name: SEA SERPENT
description: Massive sea snakes with gauzy fins, scales, and serrated fangs.
statblock: AC 14, HP 58, ATK 3 bite +8 (2d12), MV double near (swim), S +5, D +0, C +4, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 12

name: SEA NYMPH
description: Blue-skinned elves with sleek fins on their arms and faces. They gather in desolate ocean bays to sing haunting melodies.
statblock: AC 13, HP 13, ATK 1 slash +2 (1d6) or 1 sing, MV near (swim), S +0, D +3, C +0, I +1, W +1, Ch +2, AL N, LV 3

abilities.name: Sing
abilities.description: All creatures who hear in double near, DC 12 CHA or transfixed in place 1d4 rounds.

name: ORCA
description: Carnivorous whales with sleek, black hide and white bellies. They attack in small pods.
statblock: AC 12, HP 39, ATK 2 bite +5 (1d10), MV double near (swim), S +4, D +0, C +3, I -2, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 8

abilities.name: Pod Hunter
abilities.description: Deals +2 damage when an ally is within near.

name: ORACLE
description: A far-eyed nord blessed with the gift of clairvoyant magic.
statblock: AC 10, HP 19, ATK 1 stave +2 (1d4) or 1 spell +3, MV near, S +1, D +0, C +1, I +0, W +2, Ch +1, AL N, LV 4

abilities.name: Berserk (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Focus. All allies within near of oracle deal +1d4 damage on each attack.

abilities.name: Fate (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. One target in near gains or loses a luck token.

abilities.name: Mjolnir (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. Deal 2d6 damage to one target in near.

abilities.name: Strike Blind (WIS Spell)
abilities.description: DC 11. One target in near stricken blind for 1d4 rounds.

name: WEREBEAR
description: A mighty, long-haired humanoid that walks with a rolling gate.
statblock: AC 11, HP 34, ATK 2 claw +6 (1d8), MV near, S +4, D +1, C +3, I +0, W +2, Ch -1, AL L, LV 7

abilities.name: Impervious
abilities.description: Only damaged by silver or magic sources.

abilities.name: Crush
abilities.description: Deals an extra die of damage if it hits the same target with both claws.

abilities.name: Lycanthropy
abilities.description: If 15 or more damage from the same werebear, contract lycanthropy.

name: VALKYRIE
description: Angelic warrior-women who Freya sends to carry the souls of worthy warriors who fall in battle to the halls of Valhalla.
statblock: AC 17 (plate mail + shield), HP66, ATK 3 blessed spear (near) +9 (3d6), MV double near (fly), S +4, D +3, C +3, I +3, W +4, Ch +5, AL L, LV 14

abilities.name: Impervious
abilities.description: Can only be injured by magical sources.

abilities.name: Divine Courage
abilities.description: Immune to morale checks. Hostile spells targeting valkyrie are DC 18 to cast.
